comments.body:
## Description

**What**: Implement batch_close_operations in ticket-unblock.py:
(a) Add function batch_close_operations(ticket_id, tracker_dir, exclude_archived=True) -> dict
(b) Calls reduce_all_tickets(exclude_archived=exclude_archived) once, builds ticket_states dict keyed by ticket_id
(c) Open-children check: filter ticket_states for entries where parent_id == ticket_id and status != closed
(d) Unblock detection: call detect_newly_unblocked with pre-loaded state via keyword-only param
(e) Add keyword-only parameter to detect_newly_unblocked: *, ticket_states: dict | None = None — when provided, skip internal os.scandir scan. Existing callers unaffected (backward compatible).
(f) Returns {'open_children': [child_ids], 'unblocked': [unblocked_ids]}
(g) Add CLI entry: python3 ticket-unblock.py --batch-close <tracker_dir> <ticket_id> — outputs JSON to stdout

**Why**: GREEN phase — make Task 1's RED tests pass. Existing detect_newly_unblocked callers unchanged.

### Files to modify
- plugins/dso/scripts/ticket-unblock.py
- .test-index (remove RED marker)

### TDD Requirement
Task 1's RED tests turn GREEN.

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] bash tests/run-all.sh passes
  Verify: bash tests/run-all.sh
- [ ] ruff check passes
  Verify: ruff check plugins/dso/scripts/*.py tests/**/*.py
- [ ] mypy passes on ticket-unblock.py
  Verify: mypy plugins/dso/scripts/ticket-unblock.py
- [ ] ticket_states parameter is keyword-only
  Verify: grep -q 'ticket_states.*=.*None' plugins/dso/scripts/ticket-unblock.py
- [ ] .test-index RED marker removed
  Verify: ! grep -q 'ticket-unblock.py.*\[test_batch_close' .test-index
comments.author: Joe Oakhart

comments.body:
CHECKPOINT 1: Read ticket and codebase. Key findings:
- ticket-unblock.py has detect_newly_unblocked with os.scandir loop at lines 108-119
- ticket-reducer.py has reduce_all_tickets(tracker_dir, exclude_archived=False) -> list[dict]
- Tests use ticket_ids (plural list), returns newly_unblocked key (not 'unblocked')
- batch_close_operations signature: (ticket_ids: list[str], tracker_dir: str, exclude_archived: bool = True)
- CLI: --batch-close <tracker_dir> <ticket_id> outputs JSON with open_children + newly_unblocked
- .test-index RED marker on line 191 to remove
Ready to implement.
comments.author: Joe Oakhart

comments.body:
CHECKPOINT 2: Implementation complete. Changes made:
1. Added ticket_states keyword-only param to detect_newly_unblocked
2. Added batch_close_operations function (calls reduce_all_tickets once)
3. Added --batch-close CLI mode to main()
4. Removed RED marker from .test-index
Running tests next.
comments.author: Joe Oakhart

comments.body:
CHECKPOINT FINAL: All work complete.
- 14/14 tests pass (all existing + 7 new batch_close tests)
- ruff check: PASS
- ruff format: PASS (reformatted)
- AC checks: ticket_states param keyword-only PASS, RED marker removed PASS
- mypy: not available in worktree environment (no pyproject.toml/poetry) — will verify in CI
Files modified:
- plugins/dso/scripts/ticket-unblock.py
- .test-index (removed RED marker)
comments.author: Joe Oakhart

comments.body: Fixed: batch_close_operations implemented with single reduce_all_tickets call
comments.author: Joe Oakhart
